author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Guerilla Games co-founder and Epic veteran building ‘a European alternative’ to Unreal Engine Epic's former tech director claims he's building a rival to American and Chinese game engines

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Co-op Aliens shooter, Fireteam Elite, is officially getting a sequel this summer Fireteam Elite 2 expands to four players and promises "deep" customization
